COURT NO. 01

The Honourable The CHIEF JUSTICE
The Honourable Mr.Justice G.ARUL MURUGAN

TO BE HEARD THROUGH VIDEO CONFERENCING / PHYSICAL MODE / HYBRID MODE ON WEDNESDAY THE 17TH DAY OF DECEMBER 2025 AT 10.30 A.M.(Motion List) - 6. SYNOPSIS SHALL BE FILED IN ALL CASES. 7. REQUEST FOR ADJOURNMENT SHALL BE MADE ONLY IN THE PRESENCE OF OPPOSITE SIDE. 8. COURT LINK ALSO AVAILABLE IN https://www.mhc.tn.gov.in/vclink 9. CASES ON BOARD, WHERE INTERIM ORDERS ARE LIKELY TO EXPIRE, IF NOT REACHED IN THE MORNING SESSION, MAY BE MENTIONED AT 1.30 P.M. SEEKING EXTENSION OF INTERIM ORDER, SO THAT THOSE CASES MAY BE TAKEN UP AT 2.15 P.M. ON PRIORITY BASIS
